post.description: Creates a new User (tenant) with the provided credentials and company name. Returns a JWT access + refresh token pair so the client can immediately start making authenticated requests.

400.description: Validation error (invalid email, password too short, etc.)

message: password must be longer than or equal to 8 characters

post.description: Validates credentials via the Passport `local` strategy and returns a JWT access token (short-lived) and a refresh token (long-lived). Pass the access token as `Authorization: Bearer <token>` on subsequent requests.
Validates the provided refresh token and issues a new short-lived access token. The refresh token itself is **not** rotated.

200.description: Refresh successful — returns new access token

401.description: Refresh token is invalid or expired

post.summary: Exchange a refresh token for a new access token

get.description: Returns the public fields of the currently authenticated User/tenant. Useful for bootstrapping the frontend after login.
get.summary: Get the authenticated tenant profile

post.description:
Generates a new API key for the authenticated tenant. The full raw key is **only returned once** in this response — it is not stored in plain text. Store it securely immediately.

Pass the key as `x-api-key: <rawKey>` on server-to-server requests.

201.description: Key created — includes the raw key (one-time)

message: name must be longer than or equal to 2 characters

get.description: Returns metadata for all keys — the raw key value is **never** returned here.
get.summary: List all API keys for the authenticated tenant

delete.description: Permanently deletes the API key. Any in-flight requests using this key will immediately start receiving 401 responses.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: CUID of the API key to revoke

404.description: Key not found or does not belong to this tenant

get.description: Returns all templates created by the authenticated tenant, each with its full list of extraction fields.
get.summary: List all document templates for this tenant

post.description: Creates a template that defines which fields to extract from a specific document type. Fields can be included in the request body or added later via `POST /templates/:id/fields`.

message: name must be longer than or equal to 2 characters

200.description: Template with fields and visual positions

404.description: Template not found or does not belong to this tenant

get.summary: Get a template by ID (includes fields and field positions)

put.description: Partial update — only fields present in the request body are changed.

delete.description: Hard-deletes the template and all associated field definitions.
delete.summary: Delete a template and all its fields

post.description: Appends a new extraction field to the template's field list.
post.summary: Add a field to a template

delete.summary: Remove a field from a template

post.description: Stores the relative coordinates `{ x, y, width, height }` (values 0.0–1.0) for each field name. These positions are used by the AI service to locate fields on scanned documents.

201.description: Positions saved — returns updated template with field positions

post.summary: Save visual field bounding boxes on the sample image

post.description: Uploads a representative scan/photo of the document type. The image is stored in object storage and the presigned URL is saved on the template. Use the visual editor in the dashboard to draw field bounding boxes on this image.

201.description: Image uploaded — returns updated template with sampleImageUrl

post.summary: Upload a sample document image for the template

post.description: Uploads a document to object storage and creates a `Document` record linked to the specified verification. Accepted MIME types: `image/jpeg`, `image/png`, `application/pdf`. Maximum file size: **20 MB**.

file.description: The document file (JPEG / PNG / PDF, max 20 MB)

verificationId.description: CUID of the verification this document belongs to

templateId.description: Optional template to use for AI field extraction

400.description: Missing required fields or file too large

example.message: File size exceeds the 20 MB limit

403.description: Verification does not belong to this tenant

post.summary: Upload a document file (JPEG, PNG, PDF — max 20 MB)

get.description: Returns all documents uploaded for the given verification. Returns 403 if the verification does not belong to the authenticated tenant.

403.description: Verification does not belong to this tenant

get.summary: List all documents belonging to a verification

get.description: Generates a short-lived (1 hour) pre-signed S3/R2 URL that allows the client to download the document file directly from object storage without proxying through the API.

404.description: Document not found or does not belong to this tenant

get.summary: Get a fresh presigned download URL for a document

post.description:
Creates a `Verification` record, enqueues a BullMQ job, and immediately returns the new record (status: `pending`). The pipeline runs asynchronously; subscribe to `GET /verifications/:id/stream` (SSE) to watch progress in real time.

**Pipeline stages:**
1. AI document extraction (confidence score)
2. CNAS affiliation check
3. Score → decision mapping:
   - ≥ 80 % → `approved`
   - 50–79 % → `manual_review` (report auto-created)
   - < 50 % → `rejected` (report auto-created)

403.description: Doctor does not belong to this tenant

post.summary: Start a new verification workflow for a doctor

get.description: Returns a paginated list ordered by `startedAt` descending.
get.summary: List verifications for the current tenant

get.description: Returns the verification with its pipeline steps and documents.

200.description: Verification detail with steps and documents

403.description: Verification does not belong to this tenant

get.summary: Get a verification by ID

get.description:
Opens a Server-Sent Events connection that emits progress events as the verification pipeline executes.

**Authentication:** This endpoint is **public** — no Bearer token required. The CUID in the URL acts as an unguessable access token.

**Usage:**
```
GET /api/verifications/:id/stream
Accept: text/event-stream
```

**Event types:** `started` | `step_started` | `step_completed` | `step_failed` | `completed` | `failed`

**Keep-alive:** a `: heartbeat` comment is sent every 25 s to prevent proxy timeouts.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: CUID of the verification to stream

200.description: text/event-stream — sequence of JSON event objects

get.summary: SSE stream of real-time progress events for a verification

get.description: Returns a paginated list of `VerificationReport` records scoped to the authenticated tenant. Reports are auto-created by the pipeline whenever the AI decision is `manual_review` or `rejected`. Use `?status=pending_review` to fetch items waiting for a human decision.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter by report status. Omit to return all.

get.summary: List verification reports (review queue)

get.description: Convenience lookup — resolves the report from a verification ID rather than the report ID. Returns 404 if no report has been generated yet (i.e. the verification was `approved` by the AI without human review).

200.description: Full report with verification context, pipeline steps, documents and comments

comments.content: Diploma scan is blurry on page 2.

404.description: No report found for this verification ID

example.message: No report found for this verification

get.summary: Get the report for a specific verification

get.description: Returns the complete report including the raw AI-generated content, verification context with all pipeline steps and uploaded documents, inline reviewer comments, and reviewer metadata.

comments.content: Diploma scan is blurry on page 2.

404.description: Report not found or does not belong to this tenant

get.summary: Get a report by ID

post.description:
Records the reviewer's verdict and updates the parent verification:

| decision | verification.decision | verification.status |
|----------|-----------------------|---------------------|
| `approved` | `human_approved` | `completed` |
| `rejected` | `human_rejected` | `completed` |
| `resubmit` | `resubmit_requested` | `pending` |

All three paths create an `AuditLog` entry with action `human_review_completed`. Returns **400** if the report has already been reviewed.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: CUID of the report to review

200.description: Decision recorded — returns the updated report

comments.content: Diploma scan is blurry on page 2.

example.message: Report has already been reviewed (status: reviewed)

404.description: Report not found or does not belong to this tenant

post.description: Appends a reviewer comment to the report thread. Comments are ordered chronologically and included in the `GET /reports/:id` response. Returns **403** if the report has already been reviewed (status: `reviewed`).

data.content: The diploma scan on page 2 is illegible. Please ask the doctor to re-upload.

403.description: Cannot add comments to an already reviewed report

example.message: Cannot add comments to an already reviewed report

404.description: Report not found or does not belong to this tenant

post.summary: Add an inline comment to a report

get.description: Returns `AuditLog` entries for the current tenant ordered by `createdAt` descending. Each entry records a significant system event (verification completed, human review, document uploaded, etc.).

post.description: Creates a Doctor record linked to the authenticated tenant. The `nationalIdNumber` must be exactly 18 digits (Algerian NIN format).

get.description: Returns a paginated list of doctors belonging to the authenticated tenant. Use `status` to filter by `active` / `inactive` / `suspended`. Use `search` for a full-text match on `fullNameFr`, `fullNameAr`, or `nationalIdNumber`.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Full-text search on name (FR/AR) or NIN

delete.description: Hard-deletes the doctor record together with all linked verifications, documents, audit logs, and webhook deliveries (cascade).

permissions.description: Scope permissions granted to this key

docType.description: national_id | diploma | affiliation | agreement | chifa | ordonnance | custom

positions.description: Map of fieldName → relative coordinates { x, y, width, height } (0.0–1.0)
